any idea what the best pontos team I can run is? I mostly use vortice pontos murphy sanga. it's tanky and strong enough, but feels a little clunky honestly

your Mouchette team is good
Pollux prefers having e3, that is when his dps is really stable, tho e2 Pollux has completed dps rotation (3 hearts for free cleansing soul)
Pollux's playstyle is very crit-cdmg heavy and also very relying onto his own angri birb talent: first played card of his in the turn will have HARDER PUNCH or bigger shield, now that talent can be trigger again after exalt, and in e3, after playing 3 Hearts, the next card is angri birb card
*plus bleed galore with Sin Mark but eh whatever*
weirdly he's pretty flexible as a dps, like he's not too picky of running with who, not even too rely on his mateys aside pumping some stuff, not even too keen of Extra Turn

## General Guide
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=sharing>) by Cheri

- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens Database and Teambuiler](https://skeydb.com/#/database) by Fjant
## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora
## Compendium

can someone explain to me how clem's quasar works
like what is dimension shuttle
Anyone know another team I can run for dzone?
what are some good team comps for daffodil?
Forgot half

Similar to leap if played first you get the Quasar effect
Unlike Leap in Ultra Round the Quasar cards get reduced in cost instead of being able to trigger Quasar effect

Dimension Shuttle comes from having Arachne in your team turning Ultra into Singularity Ultra
A copy of the card goes into Ultra Space and gets Beacon buffs. Instead of Insight you grab the leftmost card from Space into Hand.
thanks makes sense
what is arithmetica harmony?

Part of Arc 2 Astral Reign rules
Once you play 10 command cards every command card after increases in cost
